Description: Use Epic 2 cluster outputs only to deduplicate obvious duplicates in large clusters before GPT ranking, without otherwise preselecting photos.

Stories.StoryDescription: Read cluster_manifest files and identify clusters containing more than 5 photos.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: The selection pipeline can identify which Epic 2 clusters are considered large for deduplication purposes.

Stories.StoryName: Collapse burst groups in large clusters
Stories.StoryDescription: For clusters larger than 5 photos, collapse each burst group to one surviving photo using existing duplicate structure from Epic 2.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: Large clusters are reduced by burst-group collapse before GPT ranking.

Stories.StoryName: Leave small and singleton clusters unchanged
Stories.StoryDescription: Pass through clusters with 5 or fewer photos unchanged, including one-member clusters.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: Small clusters and single-member clusters are not deduplicated away before GPT ranking.

Stories.StoryDescription: Build the final per-day GPT candidate list from all untouched photos plus the survivors from deduplicated large clusters.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: Every day can produce a complete post-dedup candidate list for GPT ranking.

Stories.StoryDescription: Add tests proving only large clusters are reduced and that no other photos are filtered at this stage.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: Automated tests cover large-cluster dedup, small-cluster pass-through, and singleton behavior.
